data.biography:
Lee Mi‑do (이미도), nacida el 25 de mayo de 1982 en Gwangju, es una actriz surcoreana de cine, televisión y entretenimiento. Su nombre real es Lee Eun‑hye (이은혜). Estudió Teatro y Cine en la Universidad de Hanyang. Está casada desde 2016 con un profesional ajeno al mundo del espectáculo y es madre de un hijo nacido en 2018.

Debutó en 2004 con la película «발레교습소» («Flying Boys») y, desde entonces, ha construido una filmografía amplia que abarca comedia, melodrama, thriller y drama familiar. En televisión destacó en series como «직장의 신» («The Queen of Office», 2013) y «운명처럼 널 사랑해» («Fated to Love You», 2014). Su trabajo le valió reconocimiento en 2015, cuando fue seleccionada como una de las «Scene Stealers of the Year» en el 1st Scene Stealer Festival. En cine ha participado en títulos como «뷰티 인사이드» («The Beauty Inside», 2015), «굿바이 싱글» («Familyhood», 2016), «죽지않는 인간들의 밤» («Night of the Undead», 2020) y «싱글 인 서울» («Single in Seoul», 2023), consolidándose como actriz de reparto con presencia carismática y memorable.
data.name: Lee Mi‑do

data.biography:
Sir Simon Russell Beale CBE (born January 12, 1961) is an English actor. He is known for his appearances in film, television and theatre, and work on radio, on audiobooks and as a narrator. For his services to drama, he was knighted by Queen Elizabeth II at Buckingham Palace in 2019.

He has spent much of his theatre career working in productions for both the Royal Shakespeare Company and National Theatre. He has received ten Laurence Olivier Award nominations, winning three awards for his performances in Volpone (1996), Candide (2000), and Uncle Vanya (2003). For his work on the Broadway stage he has received a Tony Award for Best Actor in a Play nomination for his performance as George in the Tom Stoppard play Jumpers in 2004. For his role as Henry Lehman in The Lehman Trilogy, he won the Tony Award for Best Actor in a Play and was nominated for an Olivier Award. Beale has been described by The Independent as "the greatest stage actor of his generation".

Beale made his film debut in Sally Potter's period drama Orlando (1992). He continued acting in films such as Persuasion (1995), Hamlet (1996), My Week with Marilyn (2011), The Deep Blue Sea (2011), Into the Woods (2014), and Mary Queen of Scots (2018). In 2017, he starred in Armando Iannucci's dark comedy The Death of Stalin playing Lavrentiy Beria for which he received the British Independent Film Award for Best Supporting Actor. He has also appeared in the television projects The Young Visiters (2003), Dunkirk (2004), and as Falstaff in the BBC made-for-television films Henry IV, Part I and Part II (2012). He was part of the main cast of Showtime's Penny Dreadful.
data.name: Simon Russell Beale

data.biography:
西蒙·拉塞尔·比尔爵士（Sir Simon Russell Beale，1961年1月12日-），英国演员。他以在电影、电视和戏剧中的表演而闻名，并在广播、有声读物和叙述者中工作。由于他对戏剧的贡献，他于 2019 年在白金汉宫被英国女王伊丽莎白二世封为爵士。

他的戏剧生涯大部分时间都在为皇家莎士比亚剧团和国家剧院制作。他曾获得十项劳伦斯·奥利弗奖提名，凭借在《沃尔彭》（1996年）、《老实人》（2000年）和《万尼亚舅舅》（2003年）中的表演赢得了三个奖项。由于他在百老汇舞台上的工作，他因在 2004 年汤姆·斯托帕德 （Tom Stoppard） 的戏剧《跳线》中饰演乔治而获得托尼奖最佳男主角提名。凭借在《雷曼三部曲》中饰演亨利·雷曼一角，他获得了托尼奖最佳男主角奖，并获得了奥利弗奖提名。比尔被《独立报》描述为“他这一代最伟大的舞台演员”。

比尔在莎莉·波特的时代剧《奥兰多》（1992）中首次亮相。他继续出演《劝导》（1995 年）、《哈姆雷特》（1996 年）、《我与玛丽莲的一周》（2011 年）、《深蓝的大海》（2011 年）、《走进森林》（2014 年）和《苏格兰玛丽女王》（2018 年）等电影。2017年，他出演了阿曼多·伊安努奇的黑色喜剧《斯大林之死》，饰演拉夫伦蒂·贝利亚，并因此获得了英国独立电影奖最佳男配角奖。他还出演了电视项目《年轻的访客》（2003年）、《敦刻尔克》（2004年），并在BBC制作的电视电影《亨利四世》第一部分和第二部分（2012年）中饰演法斯塔夫。他是Showtime的Penny Dreadful的主要演员之一。
data.name: 西蒙·拉塞尔·比尔

data.biography:
西蒙·拉塞爾·比爾爵士（Sir Simon Russell Beale，1961 年 1 月 12 日-），英國演員。他以在電影、電視和戲劇中的表演而聞名，並在廣播、有聲讀物和敍述者中工作。由於他對戲劇的貢獻，他於 2019 年在白金漢宮被英國女王伊麗莎白二世封為爵士。

他的戲劇生涯大部分時間都在為皇家莎士比亞劇團和國家劇院製作。他曾獲得十項勞倫斯·奧利弗獎提名，憑藉在《沃爾彭》（1996 年）、《老實人》（2000 年）和《萬尼亞舅舅》（2003 年）中的表演贏得了三個獎項。由於他在百老匯舞台上的工作，他因在 2004 年湯姆·斯託帕德 （Tom Stoppard） 的戲劇《跳線》中飾演喬治而獲得託尼獎最佳男主角提名。憑藉在《雷曼三部曲》中飾演亨利·雷曼一角，他獲得了託尼獎最佳男主角獎，並獲得了奧利弗獎提名。比爾被《獨立報》描述為“他這一代最偉大的舞台演員”。

比爾在莎莉·波特的時代劇《奧蘭多》（1992）中首次亮相。他繼續出演《勸服》（1995 年）、《王子復仇記》（1996 年）、《我與瑪麗蓮的一週》（2011 年）、《深藍的大海》（2011 年）、《走進森林》（2014 年）和《蘇格蘭瑪麗女王》（2018 年）等電影。2017 年，他出演了阿曼多·伊安努奇的黑色喜劇《斯大林之死》，飾演拉夫倫蒂·貝利亞，並因此獲得了英國獨立電影獎最佳男配角獎。他還出演了電視項目《年輕的訪客》（2003 年）、《敦刻爾克》（2004 年），並在 BBC 製作的電視電影《亨利四世》第一部分和第二部分（2012 年）中飾演法斯塔夫。他是 Showtime 的 Penny Dreadful 的主要演員之一。
data.name: 西蒙·拉塞爾·比爾

小清水亚美（日语：小清水 亜美／こしみず あみ Koshimizu Ami，1986年2月15日—）是一名日本女性声优。东京都国分寺市出身。血型AB型，之前是自由身（2018年3月1日起，从AXL ONE离所），现在是Office Restart所属（2022年1月6日起，从自由身加入）。

代表作有《交响诗篇》（安妮莫内）、《女神异闻录4》（天城雪子）、《狼与辛香料》（赫萝）、《Suite 光之美少女♪》（北条响／旋律天使）、《格斗天王系列》（不知火舞）等。

data.biography: Aktor wzbudza ogromne zainteresowanie, a jego życie osobiste owiane jest tajemnicą. Morrone stara się pielęgnować swoją prywatność, ale od czasu do czasu na Instagramie dzieli się prywatnymi zdjęciami. W latach 2014-2018 był żonaty z libańską projektantką mody, Roubą Saadeh, z którą ma dwóch synów: Marcuda i Brado, którzy mieszkają ze swoją mamą w Bejrucie. Gwiazdor obecnie spotyka się z tancerką, Eleną D'Amario.

Michele Morrone (Italian pronunciation: [miˈkɛːlemorˈroːne]; born 3 October 1990) is an Italian actor, model, singer, and fashion designer. He gained international recognition after portraying the role of Massimo Torricelli in the 2020 erotic thriller 365 Days and its sequels, 365 Days: This Day and The Next 365 Days in 2022.

Description above from the Wikipedia Michele Morrone, article licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.

Michele Morrone est un acteur, mannequin, chanteur et créateur de mode italien apparaissant dans des films italiens et polonais. Il a acquis une reconnaissance internationale après avoir incarné le rôle de Massimo Torricelli dans le drame romantique érotique 2020 365 Days.

💥Микеле Морроне. Родился в 1990-ом году в Битонто, Италия. Рос в семье с 3-мя старшими сёстрами. Отец работал строителем, а мать была швеёй. Учился в театральной школе Фраскини в Павии. Работает актёром, певцом и моделью. Был женат на модельере Рубе Сааде, у пары 2-ое сыновей: Маркус и Брандо. Свою текущую личную жизнь предпочитает держать в тайне

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «365 дней» (2020), «Меган» (2024), «Горничная» (2025), «Ещё одна простая просьба» (2025)

⭐Интересный факт⭐: Микеле профессионально поёт и сам исполнил большинство песен для фильма «365 дней»
data.name: Микеле Морроне

data.biography:
Michele Morrone, 3 Ekim 1990 tarihinde Bitonto, Apulia, İtalya'da dünyaya gelmiş İtalyan aktör, şarkıcı ve modeldir. Küçük yaşta babasını kaybeden Morrone, gençliğinde bir Harry Potter filmi izlemesinin ardından oyunculuğa ilgi duymaya başlamış ve bu alanda kendini geliştirmek üzere Pavia'daki Teatro Fraschini'de tiyatro eğitimi almıştır. Kariyerinin ilk yıllarında tiyatro sahnesinde ve çeşitli İtalyan televizyon dizilerinde ("Come un Delfino", "Squadra Antimafia", "Sirene" gibi) yardımcı rollerde yer alarak deneyim kazanmıştır. 2016 yılında İtalya'nın popüler dans yarışması programı "Ballando con le Stelle"ye (Yıldızlarla Dans) katılarak ikinci olması, ülkesindeki tanınırlığını artırmıştır.

Morrone'nin kariyerindeki asıl büyük patlama ve uluslararası şöhrete ulaşması, 2020 yılında Polonya yapımı erotik drama filmi "365 Days" (365 Gün / 365 Dni) ile gerçekleşmiştir. Filmin Netflix platformunda dünya çapında yayınlanmasıyla birlikte, Morrone'nin canlandırdığı gizemli, karizmatik ve dominant Sicilyalı mafya lideri Massimo Torricelli karakteri büyük ilgi görmüş ve aktör, kısa sürede küresel bir fenomen haline gelmiştir. Film ve karakterin yarattığı tartışmalara rağmen, Morrone'nin performansı ve ekran karizması ona milyonlarca hayran kazandırmış ve bu rolü, 2022'de yayınlanan devam filmleri "365 Days: This Day" (365 Gün: Bugün) ve "The Next 365 Days" (Sonraki 365 Gün) ile tekrar canlandırmıştır.

Oyunculuktaki bu ani yükselişini müzik alanına da taşıyan Morrone, profesyonel bir şarkıcı olarak da başarılı bir kariyere imza atmıştır. 2020 yılında, "365 Days" filminde de yer alan hit şarkısı "Feel It"in bulunduğu "Dark Room" adlı ilk albümünü yayınlamıştır. Bunu 2023'te çıkan "Double" albümü takip etmiştir. Şarkıları ve müzik videoları, genellikle onun ekrandaki yoğun ve romantik imajını pekiştirir niteliktedir.

Oyunculuk kariyerine uluslararası projelerle devam eden Morrone, İtalyan yapımı "Duetto" (2022) filminde yer almış ve Hollywood'a önemli bir adım atarak, Megan Fox ile başrolleri paylaştığı bilim kurgu-gerilim filmi "Subservience"de rol almıştır . Bu proje, onun "365 Days" serisinin dışındaki rollerde de kendini gösterme ve uluslararası alandaki yerini sağlamlaştırma çabası olarak değerlendirilmektedir. Aynı zamanda modellik ve marka iş birlikleriyle de adından söz ettirmektedir.

Michele Morrone (italienische Aussprache: [miˈkɛːle morˈroːne]; geboren am 3. Oktober 1990) ist ein italienischer Schauspieler, Model, Sänger und Modedesigner.​

Er erlangte internationale Bekanntheit durch seine Rolle als Massimo Torricelli in dem erotischen Thriller 365 Days von 2020 sowie in dessen Fortsetzungen 365 Days: This Day und The Next 365 Days aus dem Jahr 2022.

Michele Morrone (Bitonto, 3 de outubro de 1990) é ator, pintor, modelo e cantor italiano. Ele tem feito sucesso aparecendo em filmes italianos e poloneses. Seu papel mais reconhecível é a performance de Massimo Torricelli no drama de 2020, 365 Dni.

Em 2020, Michele Morrone se tornou internacionalmente famoso depois de desempenhar o papel principal de Massimo Torricelli em 365 Dni, onde fez par romântico com Anna-Maria Sieklucka. O filme, que é inspirado na trilogia 365 Dni, da escritora Polaca, Blanka Lipińska, foi lançado na Polónia em 7 de fevereiro de 2020 e foi posteriormente disponibilizado na Netflix. Ele rapidamente ganhou reconhecimento mundial, principalmente devido às cenas que se assemelhavam aos do filme de 2015 Fifty Shades of Grey.
Kazuto Mokudai is a Japanese actor and singer.

data.biography:
Brec Bassinger (born May 25, 1999) is an American actress. She began her career as a teenager and received recognition for her leading role in the Nickelodeon comedy series Bella and the Bulldogs (2015–2016). She then starred in the horror film 47 Meters Down: Uncaged (2019).

Bassinger gained recognition for leading The CW superhero series Stargirl (2020–2022), winning two Saturn Awards for her portrayal of the title character. She also starred in the supernatural horror film Final Destination Bloodlines (2025), her highest-grossing release to date.
data.name: Brec Bassinger

data.biography: Η Μπρεκ Μπάσιντζερ (γεννημένη στις 25 Μαΐου 1999) είναι Αμερικανίδα ηθοποιός. Είναι γνωστή για τον πρωταγωνιστικό της ρόλο ως Bella Dawson στη σειρά Bella and the Bulldogs του Nickelodeon το 2015-2016, Το 2020, η Bassinger άρχισε να παίζει τον ομώνυμο ρόλο στη σειρά Stargirl από το DC Universe και το The CW, βασισμένη στον χαρακτήρα από τα DC Comics.

Brec Marie Bassinger (25 de mayo de 1999) es una actriz estadounidense. Es conocida por interpretar a Bella Dawson en la serie de Nickelodeon Bella and the Bulldogs y a Courtney Whitmore / Stargirl en la serie Stargirl.

Attrice statunitense nota per aver interpretato Bella Dawson nel telefilm Bella e i Bulldogs per la Nickelodeon. Ha anche recitato nel film TV fantasy Vampiro per caso e in alcuni degli episodi de I fantasmi di casa Hathaway.

data.name: ブレック・バッシンジャー

data.biography: Brec Bassinger (născută pe 25 mai 1999) este o actriță americană.  Este cunoscută pentru rolul principal ca Bella Dawson în serialul Nickelodeon (2015-2016) "Bella and the Bulldogs". În 2020, Bassinger a început să joace rolul titular în serialul "Stargirl" din DC Universe și The CW, bazat pe personajul din DC Comics.

Aaron Clifton Moten (born February 28, 1989) is an American actor. He began acting as a youth, playing in his school theatre program. After graduating from the Juilliard School, he began professionally acting in New York City, playing in the main cast of the Netflix television sitcom Disjointed (2017–2018). Moten has since starred in Next (2020), Father Stu (2022), Emancipation (2022), and Fallout (2024).

Description above from the Wikipedia article Aaron Moten, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Aaron Moten

data.biography:
Aaron Moten, né le 28 février 1989 à Austin au Texas, est un acteur américain. Formé à la prestigieuse Juilliard School dont il sort diplômé en 2011, il débute sa carrière sur les planches new-yorkaises avec des rôles dans *Much Ado About Nothing* et une reprise de *A Streetcar Named Desire* à Broadway.

Il se fait remarquer au théâtre dans la pièce *The Flick* d'Annie Baker (2013), pour laquelle il est nommé aux Drama Desk Awards dans la catégorie Outstanding Featured Actor in a Play. À la télévision, il intègre des séries comme *Mozart in the Jungle* (2015-2016), *The Night Of* (2016) et surtout *Disjointed* (2017-2018) sur Netflix, où il incarne Travis aux côtés de Kathy Bates.

Au cinéma, Aaron Moten apparaît dans *Ricki and the Flash* (2015) avec Meryl Streep, *The Transfiguration* (2016), *Father Stu* (2022) face à Mark Wahlberg, et *Emancipation* (2022) d'Antoine Fuqua avec Will Smith. Il accède à la notoriété internationale en 2024 avec le rôle principal de Maximus dans la série post-apocalyptique *Fallout* sur Prime Video, acclamée par la critique et renouvelée pour une seconde saison.

Marié depuis 2014 à la danseuse islandaise Lilja Rúriksdóttir, il réside en Islande.

Аарон Кліфтон Мотен (нар. 28 лютого 1989 року) — американський актор. Акторську кар’єру розпочав у юному віці, виступаючи в шкільному театральному гуртку. Після закінчення Джульярдської школи він почав професійно працювати в Нью-Йорку, де увійшов до основного акторського складу телевізійного ситкому Netflix «Незв'язна» (2017–2018). Згодом Мотен знявся у проєктах «Некст» (2020), «Отець Стю» (2022), «Визволення» (2022) та «Фолаут» (2024).
data.name: Аарон Мотен
แอรอน โมเต็น

data.biography: Aaron Moten, geboren am 28. Februar 1989 in Austin, Texas, ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler, der seine Laufbahn nach einer Ausbildung an der Juilliard School zunächst auf der Theaterbühne begann und sich anschließend im Film- und Serienbereich etablierte. Einem breiteren Publikum wurde er vor allem durch seine Rollen in der Netflix-Serie „Disjointed“, in den Filmen „Father Stu“ und „Emancipation“ sowie als Maximus in der postapokalyptischen Serie „Fallout“ bekannt.

Rebecca Marie "Becky" O'Donohue and Jessica Elleanore "Jessie" O'Donohue (born July 13, 1980) are American reality TV show contestants, models, former actresses and former basketball players. The identical twins played college basketball at Niagara University before starting a career in entertainment and modeling. In 2006, Becky was a semi-finalist in the fifth season of American Idol.
data.name: Becky O'Donohue

data.biography: Baek Jin-hee (백진희) is a South Korean actress.
data.name: Baek Jin-hee

data.biography:
Baek Jin-Hee é uma atriz e modelo sul-coreana da ANDMARQ Studio Agency. Ela estreou no drama da SBS de 2009, 'Loving You A Thousand Times'. Ela é mais conhecida por sua atuação premiada como a tortuosa Imperatriz Tanashiri no drama de época de sucesso de 2013 'Empress Ki', que lhe rendeu o prêmio de Melhor Nova Atriz no MBC Drama Awards de 2013 e o Prêmio de Melhor Nova Atriz no Baeksang Arts de 2014. Prêmios.

Em 2017, Baek Jin-Hee e Yoon Hyun-Min oficializaram seu relacionamento depois de trabalharem juntos em ‘My Daughter, Geum Sa Wol’. Foi revelado que eles começaram a namorar em abril de 2016. Em 4 de setembro de 2023 foi anunciado que eles se separaram após 7 anos.

Kiowa Joseph Gordon (born March 25, 1990) is an American actor of Hualapai descent. He is best known for his role as shapeshifter Embry Call in The Twilight Saga, as well as Junior in the TV series The Red Road.
data.name: Kiowa Gordon

data.biography: Génesis Rodríguez Pérez (born July 29, 1987) is an American actress. She is known for her roles in the Telemundo television telenovela series Prisionera, Dame Chocolate and Doña Bárbara. She also played Becky Ferrer on Days of our Lives. She has also starred in the films Man on a Ledge, Casa de Mi Padre, What to Expect When You're Expecting, and The Last Stand.
data.name: Genesis Rodriguez

data.biography:
Genesis Rodriguez nasceu em Miami, Flórida. Ela é filha de José Luis 'El Puma' Rodríguez, o famoso cantor e ator venezuelano, e de Carolina Perez, uma modelo cubana. Ela tem duas meias-irmãs. Ela foi educada na Escola Carrolton do Sagrado Coração de Miami. Desde a infância, Rodríguez sabia que ela queria atuar e assistiu a aulas de verão no renomado Lee Strasberg Theatre and Film Institute, bem como iniciou outros treinamentos de atuação.

O sucesso se seguiu e ela ganhou papéis em séries de língua espanhola como Prisionera (2004), Dame Chocolate (2007) e Dona Bárbara (2008). Ela também apareceu como Sarah no seriado de sucesso "Entourage" (2004). Os projetos de filmes incluem À Beira do Abismo (2012), O Último Desafio (2013) e O Que Esperar Quando Você Está Esperando (2012).

Генезис дебютировала в кино в 1994 году, сыграв роль танцовщицы в телесериале «Клуб из Лос-Тигритос». В 2012 году Родригес сыграла роль Сони в фильме «В доме отца», за которую она получила номинацию «Лучшая актриса второго плана/художественный фильм» премии «Imagen Awards». В том же году она сыграла роль Энджи в фильме «На грани», за которую получила номинацию «Любимая киноактриса—роль второго плана» премии «ALMA». В обеих номинация её обошла Сьерра Рамирес за роль Энсидэд в фильме «Девушка в прогрессе».
data.name: Хенесис Родригес

data.biography: 珍尼希斯·罗德里格兹·佩雷斯（1987年7月29日-），美国女演员。她因在Telemundo电视连续剧《Prisionera》、《Dame Chocolate》和《DoñaBárbara》中的角色而闻名。她还在《我们的日子》中扮演贝基·费雷尔。她还出演了电影《窗台上的男人》、《Casa de Mi Padre》、《期待时会发生什么》和《最后一战》。
data.name: 珍尼希斯·罗德里格兹

data.biography: 珍尼希斯·洛迪文裏格茲·佩雷斯（1987 年 7 月 29 日-），美國女演員。她因在 Telemundo 電視聯續劇《Prisionera》、《Dame Chocolate》和《DoñaBárbara》中的角色而聞名。她還在《我們的日子》中扮演貝基·費雷爾。她還出演了電影《天際 100 分鐘》、《Casa de Mi Padre》、《期待時會發生什麼》和《最後一戰》。
data.name: 珍尼希斯·洛迪文裏格茲

data.biography:
Kapook Ploynira Hiruntaveesin is a Thai actress and model under GMMTV. She graduated from a demonstration school affiliated with Srinakharinwirot University. Kapook has a bachelor's degree in business administration from Bangkok University. She is currently in a relationship with Channel 3 actor Krating Khunnarong.

At the age of 14, Kapook began booking commercials. In 2016, she had a supporting role as Orn in Senior Secret Love: My Lil Boy. Since then, she has taken part in a pile of dramas.
data.name: Ploynira Hiruntaveesin
พลอยนิรา หิรัญทวีศิลป์

data.overview: Sau một nghìn năm tu luyện, Hàn Phách Thải Chu, Chu Nhi được Phật tổ giác ngộ và hóa thành người, hóa thân thành thợ săn yêu xuống trần gian. Cô cùng Cam Lộ, Chi Thảo và Trường Phong kề vai sát cánh trừ ma bảo vệ đạo. Họ cùng nhau tiêu diệt ma quỷ và bảo vệ đạo pháp. Chu Nhi có tình cảm sâu đậm với Cam Lộ, nhưng vì người và yêu khác biệt nên cô rơi vào đau khổ. Khi Vô Hư chưởng môn bị yêu lực phản phệ, mưu tính đoạt lấy tu vi của cô, Chu Nhi đã hi sinh ba ngàn năm đạo hạnh để diệt trừ tà ma cứu lấy mọi người. Sau tất cả, cô mới thấu hiểu tình cảm chân thành thực sự thuộc về Chi Thảo.
data.title: Nhện Tiên

data.biography: 17岁开始跟名画家何白里老师学画，1969年起多次举办个人画展，70年代初于社区中心教画及演话剧。1973年开始获全港公开画赛首席奖（1973年、1977年）、悉尼金奖与亚太区中国水墨画入选奖（1993年）等多个奖项，艺员米雪、李香琴、周丽淇皆为其习画徒弟，2002年结集成《勉良近作集》出版并于旺角设立其个人画室“青丘轩”。他擅长绘国画中的山水画与自然写生，而在电视剧中亦有其作品出现，如《金装四大才子》、电影《金枝玉叶》、热播电视剧《女警爱作战》等。除国画外亦擅长篆刻与雕刻等艺术工作。
data.name: 陈勉良

data.biography: 陳勉良，又名陳德，原籍廣東新興縣，生於香港，為香港資深畫家及演員，也是無綫電視基本藝人合約藝員。香港演員米雪、周勵淇和李香琴等為其徒弟。
data.name: 陳勉良
